description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with four jobs: lint, test, test-python-36, and publish, all running in the default test stage. Use the python:3 Docker image for lint and publish, and fedora:latest for test and fedora:38 for test-python-36. In the lint job run "pip install pre-commit" then "pre-commit run --all-files --show-diff-on-failure". In the test job install python3-pip, python3.9 and python3.11 via dnf, install nox with pip, copy sample_san_top.conf to /etc/san_top.conf, and execute "nox". In the test-python-36 job install python3-pip and python36 via dnf, install "virtualenv<20.22.0" and nox with pip, copy the config file, and run "nox -f \"noxfile-python36.py\"". In the publish job, which needs test and lint, trigger only on changes to libsan/__about__.py when on the default branch of the specified project, then run "pip install hatch", "hatch build", and "hatch publish".
